attributes.action: Ban all non Stun slaughter of Animals in the UK.
attributes.additional_details: Ban non Stun slaughter.. it is inhumane and we have UK laws governing the treatment and welfare of our animals... Why is there a different rule for different people when there is only one government..
attributes.background: We have an animal welfare act in place to prevent cruelty to invertebrates, to ensure care and kindly treatment is provided. All slaughter should be careful and respectful in the UK.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

End slaughter of animals without prior stunning in the UK
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762122
